title: Progress Toward SHAPE Constrained Computational  Prediction of Tertiary Interactions in RNA Structure
author: De Bisschop, Grégoire
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Supplementary repository for the "Progress Toward SHAPE Constrained Computational  Prediction of Tertiary Interactions in RNA Structure" article. Contains the simulation on the  Didymium iridis  lariat-capping ribozyme (DiLCrz, PDB ID: 4P8Z).
steps_raw: Supplementary repository for the "Progress Toward SHAPE Constrained Computational  Prediction of Tertiary Interactions in RNA Structure" article. Contains the simulation on the  Didymium iridis  lariat-capping ribozyme (DiLCrz, PDB ID: 4P8Z).
keywords: ribozyme; shape probing; RNA structure modeling
